name: Mistral Small (24.09)
seoTitle: Mistral Small (24.09) — Mistral AI LLM specs
metaDescription: Mistral Small (24.09) (Mistral AI), released 2024-09-17 — part of the Mistral Small line. Earlier proprietary Small release (mistral-small-2409).
overview: Mistral Small (24.09) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Mistral Small line. Released 2024-09-17. Compact open-weight line for low-latency, locally deployable general use.
What's notable in this version: Earlier proprietary Small release (mistral-small-2409).
